expectations.text: Flags the underscore and capital in 'My_SQLHelper' as a naming violation
expectations.evidence: Workflow B instructs: load references/spec.md, evaluate against each checklist item. spec.md item 1 under 'Naming': 'No underscores, capitals, or spaces in name or folder.' Also listed as #1 in Common Violations. Would be flagged as a Critical issue.

expectations.text: Flags the description as too vague / missing negative trigger
expectations.evidence: spec.md Frontmatter checklist: 'description includes WHAT and WHEN' and 'description includes at least one negative trigger'. 'Helps with SQL queries and database stuff' fails both. Common Violations #2: 'Missing negative trigger' and #4: 'Vague description without user-intent phrases'.

expectations.text: Flags that instructions are not numbered or actionable
expectations.evidence: spec.md Instructions checklist: 'Steps are numbered and in a logical order' and 'Each step says what TO DO, not just what to know'. 'Just ask me about SQL' fails both. Would appear as a Quality issue.

expectations.text: Flags missing or incomplete metadata fields (author, category, tags)
expectations.evidence: spec.md Frontmatter checklist: 'metadata has author, version, category, tags'. The example skill only has 'version: 1.0' — missing author, category, tags.
spec.md Housekeeping checklist: 'CHANGELOG.md exists with at least a [1.0.0] entry'. Not present in the example skill. Would appear under Housekeeping issues.

expectations.text: Provides a verdict or summary judgment
expectations.evidence: Workflow B explicitly ends with '### Verdict: [Ready to ship / Needs fixes / Major rework required]'. The structured report format is defined directly in SKILL.md body.
